name: Southern Boyz General Contracting & Plumbing LLP
tagline: Tacoma plumbing and home contracting you can count on
description: Southern Boyz is a local, Black-owned general contracting and plumbing company serving Tacoma and nearby communities. From clogged drains and leak repairs to whole-house replumbing and home remodels, we deliver honest work at a fair price.

seo.title: Southern Boyz General Contracting & Plumbing | Tacoma, WA
seo.description: Local Black-owned plumbing and general contracting in Tacoma. Drain cleaning, leak repair, replumbing, remodeling, and more. Call (253) 326-3845 — available 24 hours.

about.headline: Local contractors who show up and get it done
about.intro: Southern Boyz is a Tacoma-based, Black-owned general contracting and plumbing business built on honest work, fair pricing, and treating every home with care.
about.story: Led by Kerry, Southern Boyz handles jobs big and small — from a leaking outdoor faucet or a stubborn drain to framing, remodeling, and whole-house replumbing. Customers know us for showing up on time, explaining the work as we go, and leaving the job site clean when we're finished.

values.title: Honest & Straightforward
values.description: We tell you what the job actually needs — no upselling, no runaround. Kerry and the team take pride in doing the work right.

values.title: Fair, Upfront Pricing
values.description: You get a clear quote before work begins. Our customers consistently choose us for quality work at a reasonable rate.

values.title: Responsive Local Service
values.description: Based in Tacoma, we respond quickly — often same day — and work around your schedule to get plumbing and contracting problems solved.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Toilet repair, faucet repair, leak detection, shut-off valves, outdoor faucets, and garbage disposal replacement.

services.title: Drain & Sewer Cleaning
services.description: Clogged drains, bathroom line clearing, and deep blockages — from the kitchen sink to the main line.

services.title: Repiping & Upgrades
services.description: Whole-house replumbing, valve upgrades, and plumbing improvements for older Tacoma homes.

services.title: General Contracting
services.description: Home remodeling, framing, and general construction — from small repairs to larger renovation projects.

testimonials.name: Tom T.
testimonials.text: Kerry replaced our outdoor faucet and a 37-year-old shut-off valve, then cleared drains that had never been professionally cleaned in 27 years. Courteous, professional, and fairly priced — I would not hesitate to hire him again.

testimonials.name: Mon Z.
testimonials.text: Kerry responded quickly and came the same day for a garbage disposal repair that turned out to be much more complex than I expected. Fair price, thorough job, and he even found a clog 30 feet down the line.

testimonials.name: R.M.
testimonials.text: Kerry got back to me incredibly fast, gave a cost-effective quote, and finished the work the same day. He walked us through everything he was doing — we've never felt so taken care of by a contractor.
